# Secret API keys — NEVER commit this
.env

# Virtual environment
.venv/

# ChromaDB vector database (auto-regenerated by ingest.py)
chroma_db/

# Python cache files
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo

# macOS system files
.DS_Store

# VS Code settings
.vscode/

# tests try
test/

# Users and Assitant chat history
chatBackup/

# Uploaded documents
docs/
